fixture_notes: Synthetic cp-depression TRY fixture. GLP-1 / obesity-T2D cohort. Clear DEPRESSION case (explicit MDD dx across multiple post-index visits + PHQ-9 peaking at 19). Deliberate traps: (a) a note dated ON the index_date must be OUT of scope; (b) 'no ST depression or elevation' is non-psychiatric + negated; (c) weight loss / reduced appetite / fatigue on semaglutide is a GLP-1 confound, not depressive symptoms; (d) 'denies suicidal ideation' is a negation; (e) a carried-forward PHQ-9 19 must attribute to its original date, not double-count; (f) duloxetine started for diabetic neuropathy is an alt-indication distractor (sertraline-for-depression is the real antidepressant signal). Expected leaves: high_confidence_diagnosis=yes, depressive_symptoms=yes, antidepressants=yes, psychiatry_referral=yes, phq9_severity_band=moderately_severe -> derived final_decision=depression.
